sourceRef: tip:A handoff checklist for when you are on leave

slides.headline: Maximize Your Leave Handoff
slides.body: Stay organized and ensure your office runs smoothly.

slides.headline: Gather Your Files
slides.body: Collect all necessary documents and updates for your absence.

slides.headline: Communicate Clearly
slides.body: Inform your backup of your responsibilities and any changes.

slides.headline: Establish a Timeline
slides.body: Outline your return date and key deadlines.

slides.headline: Update Your Records
slides.body: Keep your absence and return details in your records.

slides.headline: Follow Up
slides.body: Check in with your backup and make sure everything is in order.
bullets: Ensure all records are up to date

slides.body: Ready to create your handoff checklist? Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Learn how to hand off responsibilities smoothly when you're on leave.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Establish a Timeline,' as the text is a bit dense and could benefit from some spacing to improve readability.
